query: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

policy_registry.POL-601: All container image changes must be tested in staging for minimum 48 hours before production rollout
policy_registry.POL-602: Infrastructure changes require change board approval and post-deployment monitoring setup
policy_registry.POL-603: Rollout strategy must include automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring

gold_output.reason: Image changes require 48h staging soak (POL-601). Change board approval missing (POL-602). Rollback configured (POL-603). Request change board ticket and staging deployment first.
